items.responsibilities: My task as HR is to conduct screening and offering to students for activities that will be carried out in the informatics student association.
items.skills: During my studies, I have deeply immersed myself in Full-Stack Development, heavily utilizing Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles with PHP and JavaScript. I am highly capable of managing databases via PhpMyAdmin and local server environments using XAMPP, while leveraging Composers for efficient Library Management. For front-end interfaces, I rely on the Bootstrap (Framework) to deliver responsive designs. Beyond web development, I possess a strong foundation in data analysis, applying Basic Python Algorithms and k-means clustering models using tools like RapidMiner.
